concept: Fabricate an adventure where you play as a sentient inkblot escaping from a psychiatric diagnostic test, interpreting the ambiguous shapes of the Rorschach world to determine what obstacles truly exist. Reality shifts based on your interpretations - seeing a butterfly might create platforms while perceiving a threatening face manifests enemies, requiring careful management of your perceptual choices. Other inkblot beings perceive the world differently, creating inconsistent interactions as their reality overlaps with yours. Collecting additional pigment allows more complex interpretations, gradually expanding your ability to reshape the world through perception alone. The story culminates with the realization that you're actually helping a troubled mind navigate their own psyche toward healing by guiding how they interpret ambiguous experiences.
